notes: Phase 4/5 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Elemental Shaman gear guide (anchor phase-5-best-in-slot-table). Tier set: Sanctified Frost Witch's line — this spec skips the tier shoulders for a non-tier drop. Rings/Trinkets split into two named slots with the top pick in slot 1.
